chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P.No.D- 1639 of 2019 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 27.08.2019. Mr. Abdul Mueed Shaikh, Advocate for petitioners. Ms. Rameshan Oad, A.P.G. for the State. Mr. Allah Bachayo Soomro, Additional A.G. alongwith IO/ASI Ghulam Abbas PS Moro. = Learned A.A.G. has filed written statements on behalf of respondents No.2 and 4 showing that the case bearing Crime No.66/2019 u/s 365-B, 452, 148, 149 PPC of P.S Moro for quashment of which the instant petition has been filed, has been disposed of under `B` class whereas another case lodged under Crime No.126/2019 u/s 506/2, 147, 148, 149 PPC of PS Moro has been challaned after due investigation. Petitioners` counsel is satisfied and submits that in respect of later case registered u/s 506/2, 147, 148, 149 PPC of PS Moro, he will avail proper remedy before the trial court and seeks disposal of this petition. Accordingly, this petition is disposed of leaving the petitioners at liberty to avail remedy in respect of later case before the trial court, if so advised. The police official present in court is however directed not to cause any harassment to the petitioners and act strictly in accordance with law. JUDGE JUDGE Tufail/PA
